team_name: NYAYASETU - Infrastructure for Legally Binding, Accountable, and Integrity-Driven Government Procurement.
summary: Design a platform for AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement using Neuro-Symbolic Architecture. The system enforces accountability, human review gates, and ensures security compliance.
optimization_claims: Efficiency: Processing 150-page bidder packages in < 6 minutes
Admissibility: Generates Section 65B certificates (IT Act 2000) for all electronic evidence
